Four contest projects, one deployable demo hub

Hackathon Launchpad

A public preview hub for hackathon projects focused on agentic bounty triage, operations workflows, and reviewer-ready handoff packets.

H0: Hack the Zero Stack

Zero Stack BountyOps

Ranks hackathon, bounty, and grant opportunities by fit, autonomy, payout collectability, and risk.

80,000 USD cash Open demo

UiPath AgentHack

ClaimDesk Agent

Routes opportunity inboxes into automation queues, approval gates, and submission packets.

50,000 USD cash Open demo

Splunk Agentic Ops Challenge

Runbook Relay Agent

Turns synthetic service logs into severity signals, runbook steps, and a postmortem draft.

20,000 USD total cash and feedback awards Open demo

Sui Overflow 2026

Sui GrantFlow Agent

Creates Sui project milestones, acceptance criteria, wallet-safe handoff text, and reviewer packets.

500,000+ USD total prize pool / track-dependent Open demo
